direction: cache H1 times absolute owner normal velocity in bed-exposed flux branch
rationale: In the ZC <= cells.ZBC[pos] CalculateFluxKernel branch, v42_rowoff forms H1 * fabs(QL[1]) twice as the left-associated prefix for FLUX1 and FLUX2. Caching that exact prefix removes one fabs and one FP64 multiply on this branch while preserving the multiplication order for both stored flux expressions.
